item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 30min Richard Hannon on Haatem:
"He's been a real star for us, winning at Royal Ascot for the last two seasons, so we'll try to get a race into him before heading there again, although I may just do it with a couple of racecourse gallops. The Wolferton will be his target again. He Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 2h Stable Tour: Richard Hannon
'She's our best three-year-old filly and we'll work back from Royal Ascot'
Richard Hannon talks Peter Thomas through his powerful team for 2026
Read with Racing Post+
https:// racingpost.com/news/features/ stable-tours/shes-our-best-three-year-old-filly-and-well-work-back-from-royal-ascot-aFZHf5F3Oszz/ … 1 5 5 mil
